title: neea coccinea
intro: Neea coccinea, also known as the Red Neea or Strawberry Neea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Neea coccinea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal purposes, and it can also be used in herbal remedies, such as tinctures and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
